---
title: "\'The Old Castles of France\'"
---

## \'The Old Castles of France\'

**Author:** Kathleen O\'Meara
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (July 1872-March 1873)

### Notes

The articles appeared as \'by the author of \\""Iza\'s Story\\""\'. CMY thought O\'Meara\'s work sloppy and anachronistic.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
